title: Potential missing dependent care deduction
explanation: Rosa's household includes Diego (age 3), who is below school age and almost certainly requires paid childcare while Rosa works as a home health aide. The application reports $0 in childcare costs, which is very unlikely for a full-time working parent with a 3-year-old.
suggestedAction: Ask Rosa about childcare arrangements for Diego. If she pays for daycare or a babysitter, enter that amount in the Dependent Care field. A typical DC daycare for a 3-year-old runs $200–$350/month.
